PETITION Petition For Order Regarding Ownership Of Real Porperty
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helen Milowe for petitioners Mark Lee and Jennie Low Bruyn.

Ms. Milowe stated that she had nothing to add to the petition. The Court granted the petition for order regarding ownership of real property, subject to review of the order.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported
